steps.title: Separate independent clauses
steps.content: The clause before the blank is complete: the geographic center's location was conceded by all involved. The clause after the blank is also complete: establishing the precise coordinates proved more divisive.

steps.title: Avoid weak boundaries
steps.content: Choice A creates a run-on sentence, and Choice D creates a comma splice. Choice B uses a colon even though the second clause is a contrast, not an explanation of the first. The answer is C.
